response.original_title: Collecting Beanies for Fun and Profit
response.overview: Collecting Beanies For Fun And Profit (1998, 53min) If you haven’t already heard, the Beanie Babies phenomenon has taken the world by storm, and the frenzy has shown no signs of subsiding. Some people collect to make money on the secondary market, some as an investment, and some simply for the love of these little “babies.” This comprehensive video takes you from conventions to private collections with Beanie enthusiasts who share expert advice on maximizing the value of your growing collection.
response.title: Collecting Beanies for Fun and Profit
